recommendation: When adding new page-level h1/h2/h3, use Tailwind text-lg/text-xl class instead of inline fontSize. Base rule provides Lora/500/1.30.

pattern: theme token alias drift — var(--color-*) used in TSX but never defined in globals.css
recommendation: Before PR, run the cross-platform token sweep from LR-4 in memory/learned-rules.md (node -e one-liner). Expect 'All N color tokens defined.' and exit 0.

pattern: URL-driven state wired only for lazy useState init — missing URL→state reverse-sync effect; same-page query changes (paste, address-bar edit, programmatic navigate that only changes the query) leave selection stale
evidence: F1 RawLibraryPage.tsx — useState(() => parsePositiveInt(searchParams.get('entry'))) but no useEffect([searchParams])
F1 InboxPage.tsx — same lazy-only pattern on ?task=N
F2 Explorer A Playwright baseline S1/S2: goto('/#/raw?entry=7') on already-mounted /raw → highlighted=[]; goto('/#/inbox?task=7') on /inbox → border-l-transparent (no highlight)
F2 Verifier Playwright S3/S4 post-fix: same paths now flip the inline borderLeft to primary / border-l-[3px] border-primary — fix verified
recommendation: Use @/lib/deep-link's useDeepLinkState<T>(paramKey, parse) instead of hand-rolling useSearchParams + useState. If hand-rolling is truly required, wire all three: (1) useState lazy init from URL (2) useEffect([searchParams]) reverse sync (3) setter calls BOTH setState and setSearchParams({replace:true}). See LR-5.
